name: Lynn Seaton
abstract: Lynn Seaton (born July 18, 1957 in Tulsa, Oklahoma) is a jazz bassist associated with bebop and swing. He has appeared on over 125 albums, including Nirvana by Bucky Pizzarelli, and the Grammy Award winning Diane Schuur & the Count Basie Orchestra.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Nancy Wilson, Singer, and Joe Williams, Singer, with The Count Basie Orchestra
JVC Jazz Festival: A Tribute to Reverend John Garcia Bensel, The Pastor of the Jazz Community

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie Williams
about_quotes.evidence: a privilege I had of playing with was Frank Wess... and Lynn Seaton. That’s a wonderful CD.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie Williams interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, October 18, 1995
